classes.name: UserManager
classes.docstring: CRUD and mode-transition service for user profiles.

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature: def __init__(self, db: DatabaseManager, cfg: AppConfig) -> None

methods.name: create_user
methods.signature:
def create_user(
        self,
        username: str,
        display_name: str,
        ibkr_client_id: int,
        mode: str = "paper",
    ) -> UserProfile
methods.docstring: Create a new user with default settings.

methods.name: get_user
methods.docstring: Retrieve a user profile by ID.

methods.name: list_users
methods.docstring: Return all user profiles; empty list when no users exist.

methods.name: update_user
methods.signature: def update_user(self, user_id: int, **kwargs: Any) -> UserProfile
methods.docstring: Update one or more user fields.

methods.name: delete_user
methods.docstring: Delete a user record.  Orphan trades/positions are retained.

methods.name: switch_mode
methods.docstring: Switch a user between paper and live mode.

methods.name: _to_profile
methods.docstring: Parse raw UserRecord into an enriched UserProfile.
